title: Sparkles ADDON: Alpha Islands
description: Applies Alpha/Developer textures on all blocks of Terralith's Alpha Islands
body:
# Sparkles ADDON: Alpha Islands

This resourcepack changes the texture of every* blocks and mobs in [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)'s really rare [Alpha Islands](https://stardustlabs.miraheze.org/wiki/Alpha_islands) and [Alpha Islands Winter](https://stardustlabs.miraheze.org/wiki/Alpha_islands_(winter)) biomes to an Alpha/Developer counterpart or look. The base [Sparkles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sparkles) pack is not required but still recommended.

## Why can't I see the textures?

In order to see the custom block and mob textures, if on Forge, Optifine does work, but we no longer recommend Optifine in any scenario. Otherwise, for Fabric, download the following mods:

- [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)

Then, make sure the resourcepack is installed and applied and that you are in an Alpha Islands biome.

*Some blocks never had an "old" counterpart and some looks have yet to be reproduced.
